meta.title: Cloud Security Engineering Services | GuidePoint Security
meta.description: Don't let security concerns hold you back. Our cloud security engineering services can provide you with the peace of mind you need to focus on your business.

headings.text: Our Team of Cloud Security Engineers are Ready to Execute on Your Vision
Comply with Emerging Standards and Compliance Programs
Meet Internal and External Policies and Requirements
Interface with External Auditors and Key Stakeholders

paragraphs: The increasing prevalence of cloud-based services and the potential risks that are associated with cloud computing make it more important than ever for organizations to invest in cloud engineering and security. It’s practically impossible for your organization to migrate to a cloud platform without both understanding the implicit risks involved and the ways to protect your teams and customers from those risks.

Our team of cloud security engineering experts can help you navigate the journey to secure modernization. We’ve been there before and can guide your team to a strong security posture. Our cloud security engineers will help you:

headings.text: Our Cloud Security Engineering Services Can Scale to Meet Your Unique Needs

paragraphs: Our highly-certified AWS, Azure and Google Cloud security specialists are available whether you are just looking for day-to-day guidance or a full cloud security engineering team. We work with you hand-in-hand to scale our cloud platform and infrastructure engineering resources to meet your cloud network security needs.
Our team of cloud-native specialists and cloud-certified architects rely on a deep understanding of cloud-native services as well as a security-first approach to:

We are able to thoroughly analyze the cloud architecture your organization uses to develop a robust cloud security roadmap and strategy while ensuring productivity remains uninterrupted and potential security risks are mitigated and addressed.

items: Accelerate your migration to a cloud computing environment
Help you adopt native cloud services and implement modern practices

headings.text: Cloud Engineering Services to Improve Compliance

paragraphs: The speed at which organizations in multiple industries are migrating to cloud computing environments has not gone unnoticed by regulatory agencies. These agencies are tasked with ensuring that organizations maintain secure operations in the cloud as well as satisfactory levels of data security and protection. Our cloud engineering services can help your organization improve its compliance with industry regulations and standards, which will benefit you by:

items: Reducing your general business risk and risk of non-compliance
Avoiding interruptions to operations when cloud security audits are announced
Giving you a competitive edge against competitors who lack backups of cloud-based applications and data

paragraphs: More than 50% of our workforce consists of tenured cybersecurity engineers, architects and consultants. We are also highly certified across industry standards as well as hundreds of cybersecurity solutions.

headings.text: Deliver on a Robust Cloud Security Strategy
Improve Compliance with Regulations and Standards
Accelerate Your Cloud Migration in a Secure Manner

paragraphs: Our Cloud Security Engineering team is ready to help you build out or enhance your cloud security requirements and roadmap.
Ensure productivity remains uninterrupted and potential cloud security risks are mitigated and addressed.
Ensure visibility and adherence to compliance requirements and avoid disruptions during an audit.
We can scale our cloud security engineering resources to help you adopt native cloud services and implement modern practices.
